---
title: "Item Index"
---

So far we have been able to locate 41 of the items used in the ACED evaluation.  We will update this if we find more.

```{r}
#| results: asis

items <- sub(".xml","",list.files(pattern="*.xml"))

for (item in items) 
  cat("*", paste0("__",item,"__: "),  
           paste0("[XML](",item,".xml),"),
           paste0("[HTML](",item,".html)"),
      "\n")

```
